date_notes: The prorogation request was made December 30, 2009 (R-104). The date 2010-01-13 in this record appears to reflect the controversy period / protest date rather than the prorogation itself. Harper prorogued Parliament multiple times: December 2008 (coalition crisis) and December 2009–March 2010 (this event). Consider updating event_date to 2009-12-30.
title_en: Federal government prorogues Parliament amid controversy
title_fr: Le gouvernement fédéral proroge le Parlement
description_en: Parliament is prorogued; widely reported and debated as a democratic-norms event of the Harper period. Included as upstream context.
verification_notes: Currently sourced only to a finding-tool text. Replace with Hansard record or CBC News before publication.

update_log.change: Added R-104 (CBC Dec 30 2009 prorogation), R-105 (CBC protests Jan 2010). Noted date discrepancy in date_notes.
